title: Content Hash Implementation Plan
summary: Implementation plan to add a Murmur3-128 content hash field to Spec and Decision nodes for change detection.
notes: This is a step-by-step implementation plan (checklists, file structure, chunked tasks) rather than a decision/requirements/spec document itself; it embeds and drives creation of ADR-002 but is not the ADR itself. Classified as DOC (plan/context artifact) with medium confidence due to embedded ADR content and proto change descriptions that could suggest SPEC-like signals.
